name: SEO & Manifest Automation

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  schedule:
    # Automation: Runs every Sunday at 00:00 UTC
    - cron: '0 0 * * 0'
  workflow_dispatch: 

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Generate SEO Assets
        run: |
          cat << 'EOF' > generate-seo.js
          const fs = require('fs');
          const path = require('path');

          try {
            // Logic-based versioning for cache-busting
            const VERSION = new Date().getDate();
            const VERSION_DATE = new Date().toISOString().split('T');
            const BASE_URL = 'https://hassanbiswas.github.io';
            const BRAND_COLOR = 'hsl(240, 80%, 50%)'; // Your brand blue

            const CONFIG = {
              '/': { priority: 1.0, changefreq: 'weekly' },
              '/about/': { priority: 0.8, changefreq: 'monthly' },
              '/projects/': { priority: 0.8, changefreq: 'monthly' },
              '/services/': { priority: 0.8, changefreq: 'monthly' },
              '/contact/': { priority: 0.8, changefreq: 'monthly' }
              // ... other paths inherit defaults via Error Handling logic below
            };

            const INCLUSIONS = {
              folders: ['.', 'about', 'call', 'case-study', 'contact', 'facebook', 'gmail', 'imo', 'instagram', 'linkedin', 'location', 'messenger', 'pinterest', 'privacy-policy', 'projects', 'refund-and-cancellation-policy', 'resume', 'services', 'terms-of-service', 'testimonial', 'threads', 'tiktok', 'vcf', 'whatsapp', 'x', 'youtube'],
              extensions: ['.html']
            };

            const getHtmlFiles = (dir, fileList = []) => {
              try {
                if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return fileList;
                
                const files = fs.readdirSync(dir);
                files.forEach(file => {
                  const filePath = path.join(dir, file);
                  const relativePath = path.relative(process.cwd(), filePath);
                  
                  try {
                    const stats = fs.statSync(filePath);
                    if (stats.isDirectory()) {
                      const folderName = path.basename(filePath);
                      // Only recurse if it's in our inclusion list or the root
                      if (INCLUSIONS.folders.includes(folderName) || folderName === '.') {
                        getHtmlFiles(filePath, fileList);
                      }
                    } else if (INCLUSIONS.extensions.includes(path.extname(file))) {
                      let urlPath = '/' + relativePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/index\.html$/, '');
                      if (!urlPath.endsWith('/')) urlPath += '/';
                      fileList.push(urlPath);
                    }
                  } catch (e) {
                    console.error(`Error processing path ${filePath}:`, e.message);
                  }
                });
              } catch (e) {
                console.error(`Error reading directory ${dir}:`, e.message);
              }
              return [...new Set(fileList)];
            };

            console.log('Starting SEO Generation...');
            const allPages = getHtmlFiles(process.cwd());

            if (allPages.length === 0) {
              throw new Error('No HTML files found. Check your INCLUSIONS logic.');
            }

            const sitemapEntries = allPages.map(page => {
              // Fallback Logic: Use default values if path isn't in CONFIG
              const settings = CONFIG[page] || { priority: 0.5, changefreq: 'monthly' };
              return `  <url>
          <loc>${BASE_URL}${page}</loc>
          <lastmod>${VERSION_DATE}</lastmod>
          <priority>${settings.priority}</priority>
          <changefreq>${settings.changefreq}</changefreq>
          </url>`;
            }).join('\n');

            const sitemap = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
          <urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
          ${sitemapEntries}
          </urlset>`;
            
            fs.writeFileSync('sitemap.xml', sitemap.trim());
            console.log(`Successfully generated sitemap.xml for ${allPages.length} pages (v${VERSION}).`);

          } catch (globalError) {
            console.error('CRITICAL ERROR during SEO automation:', globalError.message);
            process.exit(1); // Force fail the action so you get notified
          }
          EOF
          node generate-seo.js
          rm generate-seo.js

      - name: Commit and Push Changes
        run: |
          git config --global user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config --global user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add sitemap.xml
          git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m "Automated SEO update: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d')"
          git push origin main
